description_long: This guard rail features two robust square stone pillars on either end, constructed from greenish stone blocks with gold accent bands. Between the pillars, a series of vertical gold-tipped metal bars are set into a black metal frame, with the bars arranged in a gentle arch, creating a decorative yet secure barrier. The base of the rail is composed of matching stone blocks, providing stability and a cohesive aesthetic. The gold-tipped bars are evenly spaced and pointed, serving both as a deterrent and a visual highlight. The overall design is ornate, suggesting use in upscale urban environments such as parks, plazas, or gated neighborhoods. The materials and construction indicate durability and resistance to tampering or forced entry.
description: A decorative guard rail with green stone pillars, gold-tipped vertical metal bars, and a black metal frame, designed for secure and ornamental urban placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, stone pillars, gold-tipped bars, and arched metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and block structure of a single stone pillar.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with visible stone base and gold-tipped bars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other stone pillar's depth and structure.
